contexts.name: Feature Matrix UI & API
contexts.description: Feature tracking matrix with status management, batch review, history, dependency overlap detection, import/export. Full-stack vertical slice with DB persistence.

contexts.name: Module Registry & Feature Graph
contexts.description: Central module registry with checklists, quick actions, knowledge tips. Feature dependency graph driving NBA engine. Checklist expectations and verification metadata.

contexts.name: Module Registry & Feature Graph
contexts.description: Central module registry with checklists, quick actions, knowledge tips. Feature dependency graph driving NBA engine. Checklist expectations and verification metadata.

contexts.name: Game Data & Debug Tools
contexts.description: Zone map, save data schema, attribute optimizer, affix workbench, debug dashboard, enemy bestiary, HUD compositor, animation state graph, screen flow map, genre evolution.

contexts.name: Abilities & Progression
contexts.description: Ability forge, spellbook, GAS blueprint editor with wiring graph and tag rules. Progression curve system with XP tables, prestige, diminishing returns. Combo chain builder.

contexts.name: Loot, Items & Economy
contexts.description: Loot table visualizer with drop simulation, item DNA genome editor, item economy simulator, affix crafting workbench. Economy simulation engine with codegen. AI loot designer and item catalog.

contexts.name: Combat & Balance Simulation
contexts.description: Combat simulation engine, choreography sim, GAS balance simulator, predictive balance, damage pipeline. Dodge timeline, feedback balance, combat action map with charts.

contexts.name: Character Design & Genome
contexts.description: Character blueprint editor with class hierarchy, archetype balance, hitbox viewer. Character genome editor with DNA codegen. Character feel optimizer and playground.

contexts.name: Core Engine Panels & Views
contexts.description: Dzin panel implementations for aRPG: abilities, attributes, effects, loadout, tags, damage calc panels. Genre module view and implementation plan view.

contexts.name: Dzin Layout & State Engine
contexts.description: Layout resolver with Hungarian algorithm, spatial scoring, viewport management, density system. State engine with conflict resolution, undo, streaming patches, snapshot management, and LLM transport.

contexts.name: Dzin Panel Framework
contexts.description: LLM-driven UI framework with panel system, intent routing, chat commands, and advisor integration. Core infrastructure for all aRPG module panels.

contexts.name: UI/HUD & Models
contexts.description: HUD theme editor, damage number palette/physics, enemy health bar FSM, inventory grid designer, menu flow diagram, low health pulse. Asset inventory, pipeline diagram, and models view.

contexts.name: Level Design
contexts.description: Level design view with flow editor, procedural level wizard, streaming zone planner, room detail panel, difficulty arc chart. SQLite persistence for level data.

contexts.name: Materials & Visual Effects
contexts.description: Material parameter configurator, layer graph, pattern catalog, style transfer. Post-process stack builder with GPU cost estimation and effect presets. Prompt builders for materials and post-process.

contexts.name: Animation & Audio
contexts.description: Animation checklist, state machine editor, AI combo choreographer. Audio codegen, scene painter, spatial audio generator. Per-module prompt builders for animation and audio domains.

contexts.name: Gameplay Subsystems
contexts.description: Dialogue, input binding, physics, save/load, multiplayer views. Quest generator for procedural quest creation. Core gameplay subsystem configuration tools.

contexts.name: Build & Packaging
contexts.description: Build config selector, comparison, history dashboard, cook settings. Packaging view with platform profiles. Build profiles DB, version manager, UAT command generator. Blueprint parser and transpiler.

contexts.name: AI Behavior & Tactics
contexts.description: AI behavior view, testing sandbox, EQS components and pipeline, squad choreography editor, tactical cover analysis, flank heatmap, patrol distribution, attack ring. Squad engine and AI testing DB.

contexts.name: Localization & Marketplace
contexts.description: Localization pipeline with scan engine, translation engine, definitions. Marketplace asset catalog, recommendation engine, integration code generator. Implementation planning with effort estimation and impact scoring.

contexts.name: Evaluator UI Dashboards
contexts.description: All evaluator UI components: aggregate quality dashboard, deep eval results, dependency graph, cross-module dashboards, GDD/game design doc views, nexus view, unified summary, holistic health, calendar roadmap, batch review, prompt evolution view.

contexts.name: Project Health & Crash Analysis
contexts.description: Project health dashboard, holistic health view, crash analyzer with error fingerprinting, codebase archeologist, asset code oracle. Performance profiling with CSV parsing and triage engine.

contexts.name: Evaluation Engine & Quality
contexts.description: 3-pass evaluation engine (structure/quality/performance), deep eval, insight generator, correlation engine, finding collector, fix plan generator. Combined health scoring and GDD compliance.

contexts.name: Procedural Generation & Rigging
contexts.description: Procedural engine for terrain, dungeon, and vegetation generation. Auto-rig system with character rig presets. Import automation with UE5 templates.

contexts.name: Asset Generation & Pipeline
contexts.description: Asset forge with generation queue, asset browser with browsing panel, asset viewer with 3D scene viewer. Material lab with PBR editor. Blender pipeline integration with script runner.

contexts.name: UE5 & POF Bridge
contexts.description: UE5 bridge with connection manager, build pipeline, build queue, remote control client, WebSocket live state sync. POF bridge with verification engine and rules. UE5 source parser and C++ semantic parser. Live coding, state sync panels.

contexts.name: Project Setup Wizard
contexts.description: Project creation wizard, setup checklist, path browser, project files panel, manifest preview. Tooling bootstrap, build verify, test harness panels. Blueprint inspector.

contexts.name: Task System & Prompt Engineering
contexts.description: Unified CLI task abstraction with callback system (@@CALLBACK markers). Fluent prompt builder with 6-section composable prompts. Prompt evolution with A/B testing, mutations, clustering. Prototype chat UI. Task DAG orchestrator and workflow templates.

contexts.name: CLI Terminal
contexts.description: Claude Code CLI terminal with stream-json parsing, session management. Compact and inline terminal modes. Output formatters: code highlighting, error cards, build summaries, warning aggregation, suggested actions. Input history and scroll sync.

contexts.name: UI Primitives & Shared Infrastructure
contexts.description: Reusable UI components: Badge, Button, Card, EmptyState, ProgressRing, Tooltip, etc. Core infrastructure: event bus, lifecycle protocol, SQLite DB, logger, API utils, constants, chart colors, Result type, error memory, file watcher, search index.

contexts.name: Layout & Navigation
contexts.description: App shell with two-level sidebar navigation, top bar, module renderer, CLI bottom panel, activity feed panel, global search, event bus dev tools. Module shell wrapper and error boundary.

contexts.name: Game Director & Regression
contexts.description: Game director module with session tracking, findings explorer, regression tracker. Director overview and session detail views. SQLite persistence for game director sessions.

contexts.name: Session Tracking & Telemetry
contexts.description: Session logging, session analytics, telemetry DB persistence. Activity feed store and bridge hook. Session analytics dashboard, weekly digest view. Progress tracking and project progress API.
